allow: Bash(cd ~ && curl -O https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz && rm flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz)
Bash(which node && node --version && which npm && npm --version)
Bash(mkdir -p ~/.npm-global && npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global' && echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH && npm install vercel@32)
Bash(git add DESIGN.md README.md package.json public/ src/ server/ customer-app/ miniprogram/ docs/ .gitignore)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: 摆摊助手 - 初始版本

- 摊主端Web APP \(React\)
- 顾客端H5页面
- 微信小程序基础代码
- Node.js后端API
- Vercel/Railway部署配置

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/midpoint/stallpro.git && git push -u origin master)
Bash(git add miniprogram/app.js && git commit -m "fix: 配置Vercel API地址" && git push origin master)
Bash(git add miniprogram/app.json && git commit -m "fix: 移除缺失的tabBar图标配置" && git push origin master)
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "feat: 完善小程序页面wxml和wxss" && git push origin master)
